lead_signal.headline: Strait of Hormuz closure creates largest oil supply disruption in history amid ongoing US tariff shock cascade.
lead_signal.body: Military conflict has shut down the Strait of Hormuz, confirmed by ECB President Lagarde as the largest oil supply disruption per IEA. Jet fuel prices doubled with airport rationing. Compounds Liberation Day tariffs at 11.8% effective rate with multi-retaliation.

module_0.title: Strait of Hormuz Closure: Largest Oil Supply Disruption in History
module_0.body: Military conflict shut down the world's most important energy chokepoint, per ECB Lagarde citing IEA. Jet fuel doubled with rationing at airports since early April. Compounds tariff shock, driving stagflationary regime with ECB growth cut to 0.9% and inflation up to 2.6% for 2026. Watch FOMC April 28-29 for Fed response to dual shocks.

announcements.headline: Lagarde confirms Hormuz closure as largest oil disruption; tariffs most sweeping since 1930s
announcements.asymmetric: Dual shocks signal stagflation regime shift

announcements.headline: Inflation revised to 2.6% 2026, growth to 0.9% on energy shock
First policy meeting post-tariffs and Hormuz closure
announcements.asymmetric: Forward guidance critical for dual shock tolerance

announcements.headline: FEDS Notes on real-time tariff pass-through methodology
announcements.asymmetric: Institutionalizes tariff monitoring as regime feature

announcements.headline: EUREP enhanced for standing CB access amid volatility
announcements.asymmetric: Precautionary crisis architecture signals tail risk
